response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile stacks; while there is brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, it is outdated and unrelated to financial systems, and there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or domain knowledge in fixed income or investment banking.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active contributor to open-source tools and community workshops
Demonstrated proficiency in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ experience on Windows for financial systems
Lacks any documented exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or SQL Server/Oracle in professional context
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, not C++ or financial domain tools
